name: Algolia
description: Monitor Algolia search infrastructure for index security and API key access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Algolia at https://dashboard.algolia.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Copy your Application ID and Admin API Key
4. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: Application ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Algolia Dashboard → Settings → API Keys (Application ID)

credentialFields.label: Admin API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Algolia Dashboard → Settings → API Keys (Admin API Key — keep this secret)

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Algolia search indexes for infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies Algolia API keys are scoped with least-privilege permissions
